SEARCH

Package com.mps.deepviolet.samples

package com.mps.deepviolet.samples
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    PrintAiAnalysis
     
    PrintAiChat
     
    PrintBackgroundScan
    Demonstrate the BackgroundTask subclass pattern used by both the DeepVioletTools GUI and CLI.
    PrintCertificateChain
    Walk the full server certificate chain and print detailed information for each certificate.
    PrintCipherSuites
    Enumerate server cipher suites grouped by handshake protocol.
    PrintRevocationStatus
    Print certificate revocation status using all available mechanisms: OCSP, CRL, OneCRL, OCSP Stapling, Must-Staple, and Certificate Transparency (SCTs from embedded, TLS extension, and OCSP stapling).
    PrintRiskScore
     
    PrintSaveScan
    Demonstrates scanning one or more hosts and saving the results to a .dvscan file that can be opened later for analysis or transferred to another machine.
    PrintScan
    Demonstrate the scanning API.
    PrintScanDelta
    Demonstrates comparing two saved .dvscan files to show what changed between scans (scan delta).
    PrintScanPersistence
    Demonstrates the three scan persistence modes: Plain text — unencrypted JSON, portable everywhere Host locked — encrypted with machine key, zero-friction on same host Password locked — encrypted with machine key + password, portable across hosts
    PrintSessionInfo
    Print DeepViolet version info, host interfaces, connection characteristics, and HTTP response headers (with security header highlights).
    PrintTlsFingerprint
    Compute and analyze a TLS server fingerprint.
